title: schrankia angustisiliqua
intro: Schrankia angustisiliqua is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Schrankia angustisiliqua include its use as a treatment for fever and its antiseptic properties, which help to prevent infection and promote wound healing. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Schrankia angustisiliqua is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and its leaves are often crushed and applied topically to wounds.
